ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account associated with the purchase */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount spent in the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city for the purchase */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state for the purchase */,
  "shipping_zip_code" TEXT /* Shipping zip code for the purchase */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Shipping country for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount record */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account receiving the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of discount applied */,
  "discount_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount was applied */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage off, buy one get one free) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment (e.g., Premium, Regular) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria defining the segment (e.g., spending threshold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_points" (
  "points_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty points record */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account associated with the points */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Total points redeemed by the customer */,
  "point_balance" INTEGER /* Current point balance of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the points were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("points_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_points_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "discount_offered" REAL /* Discount offered during the campaign */,
  "target_segment" INTEGER /* Target customer segment for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_segment FOREIGN KEY ("target_segment") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was received */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account associated with the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., purchase, feedback, account update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounted_purchases" (
  "discounted_purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discounted purchase record */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase that was discounted */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applied to that purchase */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discounted_purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounted_purchases_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounted_purchases_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_history" (
  "segment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment history record */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account associated with the segment history */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the segment assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the segment assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_history_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign response record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marketing campaign */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer account responding to the campaign */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was received */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., purchase, click-through, open) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id")
)
